
Sac radio is a pretty simple system, there's 2 things you want to do to your plane. Start by selecting your plane, then right clicking it and making an empty. Rename that to whatever you want, in this image i have it named to SaccRadio

  
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
  
From here modify it however you please, I usually keep it to default, but if you want to make team radios or work on a system to let people change frequencies and stuff, its here

![](data:image/png;base64,)  

Once that's complete, you'll want to go back and click on your plane, observe the image here

![](data:image/png;base64,)

 Under here, you’ll see “Sacc Enity” on the right side, find where it says "Extension Udon Behaviors” and open it up, you'll see a couple of things here. Hit the plus at the bottom of that menu and drag the Empty you made earlier into it, it should look like this.


![](data:image/png;base64,)

Once you do that, place a radio zone prefab or get a friend to test the radio, it should work
